diagrams.title: Memory Layout in C++
diagrams.description: Shows the memory segments in a C++ program
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where static and dynamic memory are stored in program memory layout

diagrams.title: Stack vs Heap Allocation
diagrams.description: Comparison of stack and heap memory characteristics
elements: Stack: Fixed size, Fast access, LIFO allocation, Automatic deallocation
Heap: Variable size, Slower access, Random allocation, Manual deallocation
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the differences between stack and heap memory allocation strategies

diagrams.title: Memory Leak Demonstration
diagrams.description: Shows how memory leak occurs when delete is not called
elements: Pointer goes out of scope but memory not freed
Repeated allocations cause heap to fill up
Eventually program crashes or slows down
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the consequences of not freeing dynamic memory
